message:
feat(models): add GPT-5.2 Codex, Gemini 2.5 Pro CLI, Gemini 3 Flash built-in model definitions; clippy cleanup

New model definitions (models.rs):
- Add openai-codex/gpt-5.2-codex (272K context, 128K output, reasoning,
  OpenAI Codex Responses API via chatgpt.com backend)
- Add google-gemini-cli/gemini-2.5-pro (128K context, reasoning, via
  Google Gemini CLI API)
- Add google-antigravity/gemini-3-flash (128K context, reasoning, via
  Google Antigravity API)
- Add all three to autocomplete candidates
- Improve model_is_reasoning() by stripping provider prefixes before
  pattern matching (e.g. "my-proxy/gpt-5.4" now correctly recognized
  as reasoning) to prevent non-reasoning models behind custom providers
  from inheriting a reasoning flag

Session SQLite (session_sqlite.rs):
- Replace format!() with std::fmt::Write for SQL value placeholder
  construction, avoiding repeated heap allocations during batch inserts
- Use i64 directly for sequence counters instead of usize→i64 conversion
  on each iteration, with proper saturating arithmetic for overflow safety

Clippy/formatting cleanup across 9 other modules:
- auth.rs: reformat multi-line function signatures and test assertions
- extensions.rs: reformat std::io::Read::take() call chains
- http/client.rs: wrap long error message strings
- interactive/state.rs: collapse single-expression map closure in
  ThemePickerOverlay
- keybindings.rs: reformat multi-line assert_ne! in tests
- pi_wasm.rs: reformat staged_files insert/get chains and let bindings
- providers/anthropic.rs: restructure kimi_device_id() OnceLock closure
  indentation for consistency
- rpc.rs: restructure bash temp file creation spawn_blocking closure
- tools.rs: restructure bash temp file creation, reformat regex init

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
